seo.description: Vibe Tracker — self-hosted task management with a Fastify API, Svelte 5 SPA, and Tauri launcher. Docker Compose deployment with CLI setup wizard.

props.title: Vibe Tracker
paragraphs: Vibe Tracker is a self-hosted task management system you run on your own infrastructure. It combines a Fastify API backend, a Svelte 5 single-page app, and a Tauri launcher — deployed with Docker Compose and managed through an interactive CLI for setup, backups, SSL, and upgrades.
The repository is private until MVP release; screenshots will be added when the product is ready to share publicly.
